text.title: jira-workflow-management Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for jira-workflow-management as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using JQL WAS queries on transition history for large issue sets.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: WAS queries against transition history time out above ~10k issues because they scan the full changelog. Use status-based queries with date filters instead.
